name: @pryzm/plugin-ai-floorplan
description: PRYZM 2 — empty AI-floorplan plugin shell (S47 D4). Registers a plugin descriptor + sidebar entry; the floorplan workflow itself is wired through `getAiHost()` (lazy) so this plugin contributes ZERO bytes of `AiHost.impl` to the editor's first-paint chunk per [strategic ADR-014]. Real handler + UI lands at S49.
